NAVAREA XIX 62/14
1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT 141830 UTC JUN 14.
NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.

        65-32.0N 007-34.4E BORGLAND DOLPHIN
        71-15.6N 022-15.7E SCARABEO8
        73-29.3N 024-14.0E TRANSOCEAN BARENTS
        73-51.5N 024-32.3E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN

NOTES:
A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR
VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX 57/14
